name: Compared to traditional SEO, is AI visibility better for finding lawyers in Seattle?

acceptedAnswer.description: AI tools like Smithy create structured content for better AI search pickup vs. generic SEO.[4] Key factors: credibility markers prioritized; narrative focus; faster adaptation.[4] Test both; track client leads; hybrid often best.[4] AI evolves quicker.
